wz|S: 在有txt单语言字幕稿的基础上，利用百度翻译API创建机翻字幕稿
title: 利用百度翻译API创建机翻字幕

在已有txt单语言字幕稿的基础上，利用百度翻译API创建机翻字幕稿。
关于如何获得单语言字幕稿，可参考
利用whisper模型自动生成英文粗字幕 | Tortoise Knight
a
https://www.tortoiseknight.top/article/whisper
在百度翻译开放平台免费注册开发者账号后，申请“通用文本翻译”服务，会得到一个APP ID和一个密钥。
百度翻译开放平台
description: 百度翻译开放平台提供通用文本翻译API、垂直领域翻译API、文档翻译API、图片翻译API及语音翻译API产品，并提供定制化、私有化服务，全面满足开发者的翻译需求。

title:
import requests
import random
import json
from hashlib import md5
import os
import argparse
from tqdm import tqdm

# Replace them with your own
# appid = '$my_appid'
# appkey = '$my_appkey'

from_lang = 'en'
to_lang =  'zh'

endpoint = 'http://api.fanyi.baidu.com'
path = '/api/trans/vip/translate'
url = endpoint + path

def make_md5(s, encoding='utf-8'):
    return md5(s.encode(encoding)).hexdigest()

salt = random.randint(32768, 65536)

headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}

class SentenceIterator:
    def __init__(self, file_path, num_lines) -> None:
        with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
            self.data = file.readlines()
        self.num_lines = num_lines
        self.index = 0
    
    def __iter__(self):
        return self
    
    def __next__(self):
        if self.index >= len(self.data):
            raise StopIteration

        item = ''.join(self.data[self.index : self.index + self.num_lines])
        self.index += self.num_lines
        return item
    
    def __len__(self):
        return (len(self.data) + self.num_lines - 1) // self.num_lines
        

def read_text_file(file_path, num_lines):
    with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
        lines = file.readlines()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('-i', '--input', help='input txt file path', default='./Eng_v1.txt')
    parser.add_argument('--from-lang', help='input language', default='eng')
    parser.add_argument('-o', '--output', help='output txt file path', default=None)
    parser.add_argument('--to-lang', help='output language', default='zh')
    parser.add_argument('--num-lines', help='count of lines passed to api one time', type=int, default=50)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    in_file_name = os.path.basename(args.input)
    in_name_no_ext, _ = os.path.splitext(in_file_name)
    if args.output is None:
        args.output = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), in_name_no_ext+'_baidu.txt')
        
    input_iter = SentenceIterator(args.input, args.num_lines)
        
    with open(args.output, "w") as file:
        error_flag = False
        for query in tqdm(input_iter):
            sign = make_md5(appid + query + str(salt) + appkey)
            payload = {'appid': appid, 'q': query, 'from': from_lang, 'to': to_lang, 'salt': salt, 'sign': sign}
            r = requests.post(url, params=payload, headers=headers)
            result = r.json()
            attempts = 1
            while "error_code" in result:
                print("ERROR", result["error_code"], ":", result["error_msg"], "| Attempts:", attempts)
                r = requests.post(url, params=payload, headers=headers)
                result = r.json()
                attempts += 1
                if attempts >= 10:
                    print("Error Persists. Exiting...")
                    error_flag = True
                    break
            if error_flag:
                break
            else:
                trans_list = [result_one["dst"] for result_one in result["trans_result"]]
                file.write('\n'.join(trans_list) + '\n')
将以上脚本的appid和appkey替换为自己的版本，然后在python命令行运行，就能得到txt格式的机翻字幕稿。
欢迎您在底部评论区留言，一起交流~
